## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy and inbound lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to creating content based on Firework's comprehensive playbooks and industry reports](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Target 5 quality inbound opportunities per week from mid-market and above](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Experiment with new content approach for 1-2 months, emphasizing use cases and industry-specific examples](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Implement lead capture mechanisms on high-performing blog posts to increase conversions](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Moving away from generic keywords to more specific, use-case driven content](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Leveraging Firework's existing playbooks and industry reports as source material](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Creating "bite-sized" SEO content from comprehensive e-books and reports](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Focus on quality leads over high click volumes](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Lead Generation Goals

  - [Target: 5 quality inbound opportunities per week from mid-market and above](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Aim for 0.5-1% conversion rate on lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Track form completions and lead quality, not just clicks](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Analyze which content pieces drive high-quality leads vs. low-quality leads](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

### Content Distribution and Promotion

  - [Promote content on LinkedIn with paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Create industry-specific reports similar to other successful B2B companies](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Implement pop-ups and banners for lead capture on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Consider adding conversational search functionality to improve lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

### SEO and Paid Ads Strategy

  - [Prioritize organic SEO efforts over paid ads initially](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Use paid ads data to inform SEO strategy when implemented](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail variations of best-performing keywords](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Track how SEO efforts reduce need for paid ad spend over time](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Winnie to share industry report and account stack with the team](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Prateek to create content based on Firework playbooks and reports for next 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Implement lead capture mechanisms on high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Track and analyze lead quality and content performance weekly](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Explore implementation of conversational search functionality](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Winnie to provide more detailed paid ads report for content strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/yjGMh5ibczwnRGqEuyiyo3CaUdqCCsJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
